prompt: Use case: identity-preserve. Asset type: runtime tactics unit sprite. Primary request: create a revised Aion Trooper that preserves the original Time Travelers concept but matches the stronger squad style of the approved Scavenger Marksman and Chronomedic. Subject: the frontline time-traveler rifleman with sealed helmet, broad segmented armor, expedition pouches, and a heavy rifle, heavier and more planted than the other two squad units. Style/medium: painterly pixel-art-inspired 2D unit sprite, moody post-apocalyptic tactics art, consistent with the approved Time Travelers squad. Composition/framing: single full-body subject, centered, grounded tactical stance, tight sprite bounds, readable around 100 to 110 px tall in battle. Lighting/mood: restrained cold reactor light with practical battle-worn shading, no flashy magic. Color palette: cold reactor white, weathered steel, oxidized teal, faded hazard orange, muted cloth gray. Constraints: transparent background; preserve the concept silhouette and rifle language; keep the unit as the squad's sturdy frontline anchor; exactly one subject; larger readable shapes; reduced micro-detail for downscaling; no floor, no scenery, no text, no extra subjects, no oversized empty padding. Avoid: glossy sci-fi armor, anime rendering, giant glowing panels, cinematic background, extreme bulk, black modern tactical gear.
